final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: single large knowledge card for children, educational illustration
Primary request: a single large illustrated knowledge card explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era, designed for children
Scene/backdrop: warm parchment-style card background with decorative ancient Chinese border motifs, river and fire elements as ambient scenery
Subject: cartoon-style story scenes of the Battle of Red Cliffs — featuring Zhuge Liang, Zhou Yu, Cao Cao, fire ships on the Yangtze River; characters drawn in cute, friendly chibi/cartoon style suitable for kids
Style/medium: flat cartoon illustration, children's educational infographic, storybook art style
Composition/framing: full-card vertical layout — large bold title at top, central cartoon story illustration in the middle, bullet-point key facts panel arranged neatly on the side or below with numbered labels
Lighting/mood: bright, cheerful, warm and inviting; friendly and engaging for young readers
Color palette: vibrant warm reds and oranges (fire/battle), deep river blues, golden yellows, soft greens; high contrast for readability
Materials/textures: flat vector-style with soft cel-shading, clean linework, no photorealistic textures
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: title "赤壁之战" must be prominent and clearly legible at the top; key story points must be listed with bullet points or numbered labels alongside the illustration; all visual elements must be child-friendly and non-violent
Avoid: realistic gore or violence, dark or scary imagery, cluttered illegible layout, adult-style painting realism
